name: newkayak12-claude-skills
description: Claude Code skills organized by topic: engineering, PM, thinking, writing, agents, and more.

plugins.name: newkayak12-develop
plugins.description: Engineering skills: CLI, SQL, architecture, database optimization, chaos engineering, Spring Boot, microservices, Kotlin, TDD, frontend, code documentation, testing, MCP builder, SRE.

plugins.name: newkayak12-pm
plugins.description: Product management skills: user stories, story mapping, story splitting, story mapping workshop, and PRD development.

plugins.name: newkayak12-think
plugins.description: Thinking and ideation skills: brainstorming, decision making, devil's advocate, problem reframing, retrospective, and thought organizing.

plugins.name: newkayak12-write
plugins.description: Writing skills: doc co-authoring, writing plans, skill writing, and writer verification.

plugins.name: newkayak12-agents
plugins.description: Agent orchestration skills: dispatching parallel agents and subagent-driven development.

plugins.name: newkayak12-planning
plugins.description: Planning skills: executing implementation plans and roadmap planning.

plugins.name: newkayak12-skill
plugins.description: Skill management: create new skills, improve existing ones, and validate skill quality.

plugins.name: newkayak12-completion
plugins.description: Verification before completion: evidence-based workflow to confirm work is done before claiming success.

plugins.name: newkayak12-portfolio
plugins.description: Portfolio and career skills: JD analysis, portfolio rewriting, company research, feedback, pattern extraction, and interview prep.
